data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. SUPERATA had just over a month between runs when producing a big finish for fourth over 1300m at Canberra, and that form has since been franked. He has had a trial since then, and he is overdue to break through for his first win. 5. SOLID resumes from a spell after failing to fire in a couple of starts in the spring, but he returns with a Rosehill trial placing over 1030m earlier in the month. This field is a touch easier, and he can figure in the top 4 fresh. Check the markets. 12. CHE OLE resumes from a spell that would have done her the world of good. She has trialled up well enough, and she is likely to be running on strongly late. Include. 10. DAWN OR DUSK made up ground on debut, and she is bred to continue to improve as she steps up further in distance. Stick with her for all top 4 combos.","runners":[2,5,12,10],"exclusive":true}
